strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience with full-stack proficiency
Recent work in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP frameworks)
Entrepreneurial experience (founded GISCollective, open-source Geo-Data platform)
concerns: No advanced AI/ML-specific education (no Master's/PhD in AI-related field)
Limited direct experience with cloud-native AI platforms (e.g., AWS SageMaker, Azure ML)
No documented expertise in AI-powered product development at scale
response.justification: The candidate meets the minimum experience requirement (15 years) and demonstrates relevant technical breadth (AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq). However, the lack of advanced AI education (e.g., PhD/Master's) and direct cloud AI platform experience (e.g., SageMaker, Azure ML) are significant gaps. Entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) partially offsets this, but the candidate's strongest AI-related work appears to be in developer tooling rather than AI-powered products or platforms.
